output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?stadium WHERE {
  ?competition wdt:P31 wd:Q342036 ; rdfs:label "Malaysia FA Cup" @en ; wdt:P585 ?year .
  FILTER(YEAR(?year) = 2010)
  .
  ?club wdt:P123 ?competition .
  ?club wdt:P119 ?stadium .
}
output.formatted:
Perak Stadium

```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

SELECT ?stadium WHERE {
  ?competition wdt:P31 wd:Q342036 ; rdfs:label "Malaysia FA Cup" @en ; wdt:P585 ?year .
  FILTER(YEAR(?year) = 2010)
  .
  ?club wdt:P123 ?competition .
  ?club wdt:P119 ?stadium .
}
```
